home.title: Tours marketplace frontend is initialized.
home.description: Public browsing, agency workflows, and admin moderation surfaces will be built from this shared Next.js app shell.

surfaces.publicDesc: Trip discovery, filters, trip detail, and guest lead booking requests.
surfaces.agencyDesc: Agency profile, trip management, moderation statuses, and lead inbox.
surfaces.adminDesc: Agency verification, trip moderation queue, ratings moderation, and SLA monitoring.
